mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(#{USER_ID})
UNION ALL
SELECT USER_ID FROM STOCUSER WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(#{USER_ID}) ) A

select.if: SELECT CUST_NM AS COMPANY_NM , IRS_NUM , CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , (FOUNDATION_DATE , 'YYYY. MM. DD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE , ADDR1 ' ' ADDR2 AS ADDR , BUSINESS_TYPE , INDUSTRY_TYPE , CUST_CD AS COMPANY_CD FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IRS_NUM = #{IRS_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT VENDOR_NM AS COMPANY_NM , IRS_NO AS IRS_NUM , CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , (FOUNDATION_DATE , 'YYYY. MM. DD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE , HQ_ADDR_1 ' ' HQ_ADDR_2 AS ADDR , BUSINESS_TYPE , INDUSTRY_TYPE , VENDOR_CD AS COMPANY_CD FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IRS_NO = #{IRS_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

mapper.select:
SELECT MAX(A.CNT) AS CNT , MAX(A.USER_TYPE) AS USER_TYPE FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , CVUR.USER_TYPE FROM STOCCVUR CVUR JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CVUR.USER_ID = #{P_USER_ID} AND CVUR.USER_NM = #{P_USER_NM} AND CVUR.EMAIL = #{P_EMAIL} AND REPLACE(CVUR.CELL_NUM, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{P_CELL_NO}, '-', '') AND VNGL.IRS_NO = #{P_IRS_NO} GROUP BY CVUR.USER_TYPE
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , USR.USER_TYPE FROM STOCUSER USR JOIN STOCOGCM OGCM ON (USR.GATE_CD = OGCM.GATE_CD AND USR.COMPANY_CD = OGCM.BUYER_CD AND OGCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE USR.USER_ID = #{P_USER_ID} AND USR.USER_NM = #{P_USER_NM} AND USR.EMAIL = #{P_EMAIL} AND REPLACE(USR.CELL_NUM, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{P_CELL_NO}, '-', '') AND OGCM.IRS_NUM = #{P_IRS_NO} GROUP BY USR.USER_TYPE
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , CVUR.USER_TYPE FROM STOCCVUR CVUR JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CVUR.USER_ID = #{P_USER_ID} AND CVUR.USER_NM = #{P_USER_NM} AND CVUR.EMAIL = #{P_EMAIL} AND REPLACE(CVUR.CELL_NUM, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{P_CELL_NO}, '-', '') AND CUST.IRS_NUM = #{P_IRS_NO} GROUP BY CVUR.USER_TYPE ) A

SELECT DISTINCT GETCUSTNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , GETUSERNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , BACP.CTRL_USER_ID FROM STOCVNGL VNGL JOIN STOCVNCM VNCM ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = VNCM.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = VNCM.VENDOR_CD AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBACP BACP ON (VNCM.GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND VNCM.BUYER_CD = BACP.BUYER_CD AND BACP.CTRL_CD = 'BR090' AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.IRS_NO = #{IRS_NUM}

SELECT VENDOR_CD , VENDOR_NM , VENDOR_ENG_NM , IRS_NO , REG_TYPE , COMPANY_REG_NO , BUSINESS_SIZE , CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , (FOUNDATION_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE , RELAT_YN , CORP_TYPE , HQ_ZIP_CD AS HQ_ZIP_CD , HQ_ADDR_1 AS HQ_ADDR_1 , HQ_ADDR_2 AS HQ_ADDR_2 , BUSINESS_TYPE , INDUSTRY_TYPE , TEL_NO AS TEL_NO , FAX_NO AS FAX_NO , EMAIL AS EMAIL , HOMEPAGE_URL , BUSINESS_REMARK , REMARK_TEXT , E_BILL_ASP_TYPE , TAX_ASP_NM , TAX_SEND_TYPE , CREDIT_EVAL_COMPANY , CREDIT_CD ,(SELECT REAL_FILE_NM FROM STOCATCH WHERE UUID = VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS EV_ATT_FILE_NM , EV_ATT_FILE_NUM AS EV_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCVNGL VNGL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IRS_NO = #{IRS_NUM}

SELECT COMPANY_CD , SL_TYPE , SL_NUM , SL_NM , ISSUE_NM , EXPIRY_DATE ,(SELECT REAL_FILE_NM FROM STOCATCH WHERE UUID = VNSL.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SL_ATT_FILE_NM , ATT_FILE_NUM AS SL_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCVNSL VNSL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND COMPANY_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}

SELECT VENDOR_CD , FI_YEAR , EVIDENCE_TYPE , TO_CHAR(OWNER_CAPITAL_AMOUNT, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS OWNER_CAPITAL_AMOUNT , TO_CHAR(TOT_FUND_AMT, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS TOT_FUND_AMT , TO_CHAR(TOT_LIAB_AMT, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS TOT_LIAB_AMT , TO_CHAR(TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT , TO_CHAR(SALES_AMOUNT, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS SALES_AMOUNT , TO_CHAR(NET_PROFIT_AMOUNT, 'FM9,999,999,999,999') AS NET_PROFIT_AMOUNT ,(SELECT REAL_FILE_NM FROM STOCATCH WHERE UUID = VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VNFI_ATT_FILE_NM , ATT_FILE_NUM AS VNFI_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCVNFI VNFI WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}

SELECT VENDOR_CD , PAY_ACC_NM , PAY_BANK , PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM , PAY_ACC_MNG_NM AS PAY_ACC_MNG_NM , PAY_ACC_NMG_TEL_NUM AS PAY_ACC_NMG_TEL_NUM , PAY_ACC_MNG_EMAIL AS PAY_ACC_MNG_EMAIL ,(SELECT REAL_FILE_NM FROM STOCATCH WHERE UUID = ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NM , ATT_FILE_NUM AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCVNAP WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}
SELECT BUYER_CD , GETCUSTNAME(GATE_CD, BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , REQ_REASON FROM STOCVNCM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}

SELECT USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM , TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , EMAIL AS EMAIL , FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM , CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM , MAIL_FLAG , SMS_FLAG , POSITION_NM , DUTY_NM , ROLE_TEXT FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND COMPANY_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT TS.BUYER_CD , TS.TMPL_NUM , TS.TMPL_SQ , TD.TMPL_FILE_NM , TD.VALID_PERIOD , (TS.VALID_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_START_DATE , (TS.VALID_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_END_DATE , TD.REQUIRED_FLAG ,(SELECT REAL_FILE_NM FROM STOCATCH WHERE UUID = TS.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATTS_ATT_FILE_NM , TS.ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATTS_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCATTS TS LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCATTD TD ON (TS.GATE_CD = TD.GATE_CD AND TS.BUYER_CD = TD.BUYER_CD AND TS.DOC_TYPE = TD.DOC_TYPE AND TS.TMPL_NUM = TD.TMPL_NUM AND TS.TMPL_SQ = TD.TMPL_SQ) WHERE TS.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TS.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND TS.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY TS.TMPL_SQ
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO STOCUSAP A USING (SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD , UPPER((SF_TRIM(#{USER_ID}))) AS USER_ID , #{AUTH_CD} AS AUTH_CD ) B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.AUTH_CD = B.AUTH_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , DEL_FLAG = '0'
, VALID_FROM_DATE = (#{VALID_FROM_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd')
, VALID_TO_DATE = (#{VALID_TO_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd')
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD , USER_ID , AUTH_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG
, VALID_FROM_DATE
,VALID_TO_DATE
) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , UPPER((SF_TRIM(#{USER_ID}))) , #{AUTH_CD} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0'
, (#{VALID_FROM_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd')
, (#{VALID_TO_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd')
)

MERGE INTO STOCVNCM A USING (SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD , #{VENDOR_CD} AS VENDOR_CD , #{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD ) B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = B.VENDOR_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , DEL_FLAG = '0' , REQ_REASON = #{REQ_REASON} , CONFIRM_FLAG = 'J' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD , VENDOR_CD , BUYER_CD , DEPT_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , REQ_REASON , CONFIRM_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , #{VENDOR_CD} , #{BUYER_CD} , (#{DEPT_CD}, 'O') , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , #{REQ_REASON} , 'J' )
mapper.select: SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , CVUR.USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_VEND' '@@' CUST.GATE_CD '@@' CUST.CUST_CD '@@' #{VENDOR_CD} AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCCUST CUST JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE CUST.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{CTRL_USER_ID}
